user.title: Goldair IR Fan
user.description: Choose the remote entity that will transmit IR signals to your Goldair fan.

data_description.remote_entity: The Home Assistant remote entity connected to your IR blaster (e.g. a Broadlink device).
data_description.ir_command_delay: Minimum pause between consecutive IR commands. Increase this if your fan misses commands.
data_description.power_monitor_entity: A sensor that reports the fan's power draw in watts. When set, the integration will automatically turn the fan on or off based on the threshold below.
data_description.power_threshold: If the power sensor reads above this value the fan is considered on; at or below it the fan is considered off. Default is 10 W.

data_description.ir_command_delay: Minimum pause between consecutive IR commands. Increase this if your fan misses commands.
data_description.power_monitor_entity: A sensor that reports the fan's power draw in watts. Leave blank to disable automatic on/off.
data_description.power_threshold: If the power sensor reads above this value the fan is considered on; at or below it the fan is considered off. Default is 10 W.
